summary: Iteration 79: Tested Cosmic Mood Ring + Enhanced Star Chart features. All backend APIs pass (12/12). Frontend UI tests pass - personalized dashboard with mood ring, star chart with bloom effects, intro video modal all working correctly.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 79 adds: 1) Cosmic Mood Ring API (/api/mood-ring) with colors, layers, trend, message - requires auth. 2) Enhanced Star Chart with Three.js UnrealBloomPass for bloom glow effects, Milky Way band, 15k background stars. 3) Draggable dashboard widgets with 6 drag handles. Set localStorage 'zen_tour_seen' to 'true' to skip guided tour.

backend_apis: POST /api/auth/login - returns token with valid credentials
GET /api/mood-ring - returns mood data with colors, layers, trend, message (with auth)
GET /api/dashboard/personalized - returns dashboard data with wisdom, progress, continue_items
frontend_ui: Landing page hero section loads with breathing orb
Six pillar cards (Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore, Sage) visible
Quick Reset, Begin Journey, Take Tour buttons visible
Intro video button opens video modal with Sora 2 AI video
Personalized dashboard shows Cosmic Mood Ring at top with animated orb
Mood ring displays mood label (peaceful) and message
Dashboard widgets (mood-ring, wisdom, actions, continue, new-for-you, progress) all render
6 drag handles visible for widget rearrangement
Star Chart page loads with WebGL canvas
Star Chart shows bloom glow on stars (visible radiating light)
Star Chart controls: World Skies, Stargazing Journey, Mythology, Badges, Location, Gyro all visible
Element legend (Fire, Water, Air, Earth) visible
Navigation bar with Practice, Divination, Sanctuary, Nourish, Explore, Sage visible
